# xelon_dns_zone (Resource)

The DNS zone resource allows you to manage DNS zones in Xelon.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "xelon_dns_zone" "public" {
  name = "mydomain.com"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the DNS zone.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the DNS zone.
